title: Does not schedule healthcheck for containers where interval, timeout, or retries not specified
body:
### Issue Description

Similar to https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/3525, the health check is not being scheduled when `interval`, `timeout`, or `retries` are not provided. Providing all fields works as expected. In my case I am providing the `healthcheck` field as an option when creating the container.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Create a container with a healthcheck where just `test` is provided.


### Describe the results you received

The health check is not scheduled.

### Describe the results you expected

The health check should run.

comments.body:
> Create a container with a healthcheck where just test is provided

Can you provide a specific reproducer please. What command are you using?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Since we never heard back with a reproducer closing.
